name: Triple-A
description: Licensed crypto payment gateway API for merchants to accept Bitcoin, USDT, and USDC.

seo.title: Triple-A — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Triple-A: Licensed crypto payment gateway API for merchants to accept Bitcoin, USDT, and USDC.

when_to_use: Licensed Bitcoin and USDC merchant payment acceptance
Crypto invoice settlement via compliant gateway API
Fiat payout after crypto payment collection for merchants

pros: BTC, USDT, USDC accepted and fiat-settled
Regulatory posture better than many peers
cons: Niche buyer base — crypto adoption still small
review.verdict: One of the more regulatorily credible crypto gateways — sensible if your audience actually pays in crypto.
review.best_for: Merchants serving crypto-holding customers wanting licensed, fiat-settled crypto acceptance
review.not_for: Mainstream merchants whose customers exclusively pay with cards
